CHUNK:029/041
Have you ever smoked at least 100 cigarettes, or about 5 packs in your whole life? [SA] 
您一生中曾经吸过的烟总数是否有至少 100 支（约 5 包）？ 
READ  
1 
Yes 
有

2 
No 
没有

Other Tobacco 
Products] 
DO NOT READ 
777 
Refused 
拒绝回答 
888 
Don’t know / Not sure  
不知道／不肯定

您目前吸烟的频率, 是…？ 
READ 
1 
Daily*

completely 
已经彻底戒烟

to Q4015 Ex-smoker]

777

Tobacco Products]

* Interviewer Note: Please include respondents who have stop smoking daily temporarily 
because of religious fasting or medical reasons. 请包括受访者因宗教禁食或医疗因素而暂时停止每天吸烟。 
 
 
[If Q4005 = “Daily” or “Occasionally”, ask the following question] 
4006a. Can you show me the pack of cigarettes that you are currently smoking so that we can 
write down the flavour of cigarette? [SA]  
您是否能让我看您所吸的烟的包装以便我记下其烟的口味？ 
Interviewer Note: If respondent does not have a pack or refused to show pack of 
cigarettes, please ask for the flavour. If there are more than 1 flavour smoked, record the 
flavour that was most often smoked. DO NOT READ [Record flavour as shown for 4006a] 
1 
Regular

Mint

Don’t know / Not sure

[Go to Q4006] 
 
 


 
97 
 
4006. Based on the pack of cigarettes, please code the theme of the graphic health warning. [SA] 
DO NOT READ [For internal coding by Interviewers] 
1 
Smoking causes blindness

12

13 
Others please specify: ____________________________________________ 
666 
No graphic warnings 
777 
Refused to show the pack of cigarette 
Note: No translation of graphic warning theme is required. [If Q4005 = “Daily”, go to Q4007. Else, go to Q4016 Other Tobacco Products]  
4007. [Daily Smoker] On average, how many cigarettes do you smoke per day? [SA] 
您平均每天吸多少支烟？

[Go to Q4008]

4008. [Daily Smoker] Do you have any intention to quit smoking? [SA]  
您是否有戒烟的打算？ 
READ AND USE SHOWCARD

Yes, I plan to quit smoking within the next 
month

months

future

but plan to cut down on the number of 
cigarettes smoked 
我没有打算完全戒烟,但有打算减少吸
烟 
7 
No, I do not plan to quit smoking or cut down 
on the number of cigarettes smoked 
我没有打算戒烟或减少吸烟

Refused

888 
Don’t know / Not sure

4013. [Ex-smoker] What was the main reason which made you stop smoking completely? [SA] 
您彻底戒烟的主要原因是什么？ 
DO NOT READ  
1 
Experienced the ill effects of smoking 
身受吸烟之害 
2 
Pressure to stop from the environment (e.g. smoking bans) 
迫于环境（例如禁烟令）的压力而戒
烟 
3 
Concerned about the health of those around 
me (through passive smoking) 
担心周围人群的健康（通过二手烟） 
4 
Concerned about the harmful effects of 
smoking 
关注吸烟的害处 
5 
Pressure/ advice to stop from family/ 
friends/ colleagues 
出于家庭/朋友/同事的压力/建议而
戒烟 
6 
Cigarettes have become too expensive 
香烟价格太贵 
7 
Social stigma associated with smoking 
吸烟不光彩 
8 
Advised to stop smoking by my doctor 
医生建议我戒烟 
9

777 
Refused 
拒绝回答 
888 
Don’t know / Not sure

[Go to Q4014] 
 
 
4014. [Ex-smoker] How did you quit smoking?
compressed_context:
CTX: SURVEY-SECTION-029/041

Q: Q4002 SMOKED ≥100 CIGARETTES (≈5 PACKS) EVER? [SA]
1: YES → Q4003
2: NO → Q4016 OTHER-TOBACCO-PRODUCTS
777: REFUSED
888: DON’T-KNOW

Q: Q4003 SMOKED CIGARETTES DAILY EVER? [SA]
1: YES → Q4004
2: NO → Q4005
777: REFUSED
888: DON’T-KNOW

Q: Q4004 START DAILY SMOKING AT WHAT AGE? [SA]
VAR: AGE
777: REFUSED
888: DON’T-KNOW
→ Q4005

Q: Q4005 CURRENT SMOKING FREQUENCY? [SA]
1: DAILY* → Q4006a
2: OCCASIONALLY
3: HAVE STOPPED SMOKING COMPLETELY
   (IF Q4003=1 → Q4011; Q4003∈{2,777,888} → Q4015)
777: REFUSED → Q4016 OTHER-TOBACCO-PRODUCTS
888: DON’T-KNOW
*INCLUDE TEMPORARY DAILY-PAUSE RELIGIOUS/MEDICAL

Q: Q4006a SHOW CIGARETTE-PACK FOR FLAVOUR? [SA]
INSTR: IF NO PACK/REFUSED → ASK FLAVOUR; IF MULTIPLE → RECORD MOST-OFTEN
1: REGULAR
2: MENTHOL
3: MINT
4: CLOVE/KRETEK
5: OTHERS (SPECIFY)
777: REFUSED
888: DON’T-KNOW
→ Q4006

Q: Q4006 CODE GRAPHIC-HEALTH-WARNING THEME BASED ON PACK [SA]
INSTR: FOR INTERNAL-CODING ONLY
1: SMOKING CAUSES BLINDNESS
2: SMOKING CAUSES CANCER
3: SMOKING CAUSES HEART DISEASE
4: SMOKING CAUSES LUNG DISEASE
5: SMOKING INCREASES MIS-CARRIAGE-RISK
6: WHEN-HOOKED → CHILD SUFFERS
7: SMOKING CAUSES STILLBIRTH
8: SMOKING CAUSES ORAL CANCER
9: SMOKING CAUSES THROAT CANCER
10: SMOKING LEADS TO DEATH-FROM-LUNG-CANCER
11: TOBACCO SMOKE HARMS YOUR BABY
12: SMOKING CAUSES PREMATURE AGEING
13: OTHERS (SPECIFY)
666: NO GRAPHIC-WARNINGS
777: REFUSED TO SHOW PACK
IF Q4005=1 → Q4007; ELSE → Q4016 OTHER-TOBACCO-PRODUCTS

Q: Q4007 [DAILY-SMOKER] CIGARETTES PER DAY? [SA]
VAR: CIGARETTES-PER-DAY
777: REFUSED
888: DON’T-KNOW
→ Q4008

Q: Q4008 [DAILY-SMOKER] INTENTION TO QUIT SMOKING? [SA]
1: PLAN-QUIT <1M
2: PLAN-QUIT <6M
3: PLAN-QUIT <12M

7: NO-QUIT OR CUTDOWN

888: DON’T-KNOW
→ Q4009

2: NO → Q4016 OTHER-TOBACCO-PRODUCTS

888: DON’T-KNOW

VAR: ATTEMPT-COUNT

(IF Q4005=3 ∧ Q4003∈{2,777,888}) → Q4015
